mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_plan(title, description, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE training_plan SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id,title,description,start_time,end_time,status,create_time,update_time,deleted FROM training_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE training_plan SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE training_plan SET status = CASE WHEN NOW() < start_time THEN 0 WHEN NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0
